lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਮਿਲਾਵਹੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵੈਗੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa satiguroo milaavahu mil satigur naam dhiaavaigo |1|
lines.english: Please be Merciful, and lead me to meet the True Guru; meeting the True Guru, I meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਗਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: kripaa kripaa kripaa kar har jeeo kar kirapaa naam lagaavaigo |
lines.english: Mercy, mercy, mercy - O Dear Lord, please shower Your Mercy on me, and attach me to Your Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਲੁ ਲਾਗੀ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਲੁ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: janam janam kee haumai mal laagee mil sangat mal leh jaavaigo |
lines.english: The filth of egotism from countless incarnations sticks to me; joining the Sangat, the Holy Congregation, this filth is washed away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਲੋਹਾ ਤਰਿਓ ਸੰਗਿ ਕਾਸਟ ਲਗਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jiau lohaa tario sang kaasatt lag sabad guroo har paavaigo |2|
lines.english: As iron is carried across if it is attached to wood, one who is attached to the Word of the Guru's Shabad finds the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਗਤਿ ਸੰਤ ਮਿਲਹੁ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਆਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: sangat sant milahu satasangat mil sangat har ras aavaigo |
lines.english: Joining the Society of the Saints, joining the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, you shall come to receive the Sublime Essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਕਰਮ ਕਰੈ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੀ ਕਢਿ ਪਾਣੀ ਚੀਕੜੁ ਪਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bin sangat karam karai abhimaanee kadt paanee cheekarr paavaigo |3|
lines.english: But not joining the Sangat, and committing actions in egotistical pride, is like drawing out clean water, and throwing it in the mud. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਉਪਦੇਸਿ ਸਮਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: khin khin naam dee vaddiaaee satigur upades samaavaigo |4|
lines.english: Each and every instant, they are blessed with the Glorious Greatness of the Naam; through the Teachings of the True Guru, they are absorbed in Him. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਖਵਾਰੇ ਜਨ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਮੀਠ ਲਗਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat janaa ke har rakhavaare jan har ras meetth lagaavaigo |
lines.english: The Lord is the Protector and Saving Grace of His humble devotees. The Lord's Sublime Essence seems so sweet to these humble beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਦੁਸਟ ਕਰਹਿ ਭਗਤਾ ਕੀ ਹਰਨਾਖਸ ਜਿਉ ਪਚਿ ਜਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jo nindaa dusatt kareh bhagataa kee haranaakhas jiau pach jaavaigo |5|
lines.english: Those wicked enemies who slander the devotees are destroyed, like Harnaakhash. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਜਨਾ ਕਉ ਸਦਾ ਨਿਵਿ ਰਹੀਐ ਜਨ ਨਿਵਹਿ ਤਾ ਫਲ ਗੁਨ ਪਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat janaa kau sadaa niv raheeai jan niveh taa fal gun paavaigo |
lines.english: Bow forever in deep respect to the humble devotees; if you bow to those humble beings, you shall obtain the fruit of virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਕਮਲ ਪੁਤੁ ਮੀਨ ਬਿਆਸਾ ਤਪੁ ਤਾਪਨ ਪੂਜ ਕਰਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: braham kamal put meen biaasaa tap taapan pooj karaavaigo |
lines.english: Brahma, the son of the lotus, and Vyaas, the son of the fish, practiced austere penance and were worshipped.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਤ ਨਜਾਤਿ ਦੇਖਿ ਮਤ ਭਰਮਹੁ ਸੁਕ ਜਨਕ ਪਗੀਂ ਲਗਿ ਧਿਆਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: jaat najaat dekh mat bharamahu suk janak pageen lag dhiaavaigo |
lines.english: Do not be fooled by appearances of high and low social class. Suk Dayv bowed at the feet of Janak, and meditated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਭਗਤੁ ਹੋਇ ਸੋ ਪੂਜਹੁ ਭਰਮਨ ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jo jo bhagat hoe so poojahu bharaman bharam chukaavaigo |6|
lines.english: Whoever is a devotee - worship and adore that person. Get rid of your doubts and superstitions. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੂਠਨ ਜੂਠਿ ਪਈ ਸਿਰ ਊਪਰਿ ਖਿਨੁ ਮਨੂਆ ਤਿਲੁ ਨ ਡੁਲਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: jootthan jootth pee sir aoopar khin manooaa til na ddulaavaigo |7|
lines.english: Even though Janak threw his left-overs and garbage on Suk Dayv's head, his mind did not waver, even for an instant. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਮੈ ਦਾਸਨਿ ਦਾਸ ਕਰਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੮॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak kripaa kripaa kar tthaakur mai daasan daas karaavaigo |8|2|
lines.english: Please shower Nanak with your Mercy, O my Lord and Master; make him the slave of Your slaves. ||8||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਕ ਜਨਕ ਬੈਠੇ ਸਿੰਘਾਸਨਿ ਨਉ ਮੁਨੀ ਧੂਰਿ ਲੈ ਲਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: janak janak baitthe singhaasan nau munee dhoor lai laavaigo |
lines.english: Janak sat upon his regal throne, and applied the dust of the nine sages to his forehead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਰਸਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: man guramat ras gun gaavaigo |
lines.english: O mind, follow the Guru's Teachings, and joyfully sing God's Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਸ ਫਨੀ ਜਪਿਓ ਸੇਖਨਾਗੈ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਤਿਆ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: sehas fanee japio sekhanaagai har japatiaa ant na paavaigo |
lines.english: The serpent king chants and meditates on the Lord with his thousands of heads, but even by these chants, he cannot find the Lord's limits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹਵਾ ਏਕ ਹੋਇ ਲਖ ਕੋਟੀ ਲਖ ਕੋਟੀ ਕੋਟਿ ਧਿਆਵੈਗੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jihavaa ek hoe lakh kottee lakh kottee kott dhiaavaigo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: If my one tongue became hundreds of thousands and millions, I would meditate on Him millions and millions of times. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਅਥਾਹੁ ਅਤਿ ਅਗਮੁ ਅਗਮੁ ਹੈ ਮਤਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਮਨੁ ਠਹਰਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: too athaahu at agam agam hai mat guramat man tthaharaavaigo |1|
lines.english: You are Utterly Unfathomable, Inaccessible and Infinite. Through the Wisdom of the Guru's Teachings, the mind becomes steady and balanced. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਤੂ ਜਪਿਓ ਤੇਈ ਜਨ ਨੀਕੇ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਤਿਅਹੁ ਕਉ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: jin too japio teee jan neeke har japatiahu kau sukh paavaigo |
lines.english: Those humble beings who meditate on You are noble and exalted. Meditating on the Lord, they are at peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਦਰ ਦਾਸੀ ਸੁਤੁ ਛੋਕ ਛੋਹਰਾ ਕ੍ਰਿਸਨੁ ਅੰਕਿ ਗਲਿ ਲਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bidar daasee sut chhok chhoharaa krisan ank gal laavaigo |2|
lines.english: Bidur, the son of a slave-girl, was an untouchable, but Krishna hugged him close in His Embrace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲ ਤੇ ਓਪਤਿ ਭਈ ਹੈ ਕਾਸਟ ਕਾਸਟ ਅੰਗਿ ਤਰਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: jal te opat bhee hai kaasatt kaasatt ang taraavaigo |
lines.english: Wood is produced from water, but by holding onto wood, one is saved from drowning.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਜਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਸਵਾਰੇ ਅਪਨਾ ਬਿਰਦੁ ਰਖਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: raam janaa har aap savaare apanaa birad rakhaavaigo |3|
lines.english: The Lord Himself embellishes and exalts His humble servants; He confirms His Innate Nature. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਪਾਥਰ ਲੋਹ ਲੋਹ ਬਡ ਪਾਥਰ ਗੁਰ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਨਾਵ ਤਰਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: ham paathar loh loh badd paathar gur sangat naav taraavaigo |
lines.english: I am like a stone, or a piece of iron, heavy stone and iron; in the Boat of the Guru's Congregation, I am carried across,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਤਰਿਓ ਜੁਲਾਹੋ ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jiau satasangat tario julaaho sant janaa man bhaavaigo |4|
lines.english: like Kabeer the weaver, who was saved in the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation. He became pleasing to the minds of the humble Saints. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਰੇ ਖਰੋਏ ਬੈਠਤ ਊਠਤ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪੰਥਿ ਧਿਆਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: khare kharoe baitthat aootthat maarag panth dhiaavaigo |
lines.english: Standing up, sitting down, rising up and walking on the path, I meditate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਨਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਬਲੁ ਪਾਈ ਹੈ ਨਿਹਸਾਸਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: saasan saas saas bal paaee hai nihasaasan naam dhiaavaigo |
lines.english: By His Training, I find strength with each and every breath; now that I am trained and tamed, I meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਚਨ ਬਚਨ ਹੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਾਧਰੁ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਜਨਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: satigur bachan bachan hai satigur paadhar mukat janaavaigo |5|
lines.english: The True Guru is the Word, and the Word is the True Guru, who teaches the Path of Liberation. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਬੂਝੈ ਤੌ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee haumai boojhai tau guramat naam samaavaigo |6|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, egotism is extinguished, and then, through the Guru's Teachings, I merge in the Naam. ||6||
